Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Appt Of Receiver & To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Credit Trade Association Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Disocvery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
